Name: Columbia Mud Roller Replacement -  80 mm / 3"
Short description: This 80mm replacement sleeve for Columbia Mud Rollers ensures even compound distribution and maximum efficiency on narrow drywall surfaces. It is a durable, professional-grade component designed for rapid application and easy cleanup.
Description:
Columbia Mud Roller Replacement - 80 mm / 3" provides a high-performance solution for applying joint compound to drywall surfaces with speed and precision. This professional-grade replacement sleeve ensures consistent mud distribution and significantly reduces application time during the taping process.

Designed specifically for the Columbia Mud Roller system, this 3-inch version is ideal for narrower surfaces and detail work where controlled mud delivery is required. The durable material resists wear and maintains its structural integrity through repeated use on demanding jobsites.

Features:

  • Precision Application: The 80mm width allows for controlled mud delivery on tight corners and narrow drywall sections.
  • High-Absorbency Material: Engineered to hold a significant amount of compound, reducing the frequency of re-loading from the bucket.
  • Seamless Compatibility: Fits perfectly on the standard Columbia 3-inch mud roller frame for quick field replacements.
  • Professional Durability: Built to withstand the abrasive nature of drywall compounds and frequent cleaning cycles.

Name: Columbia Mud Roller Replacement -  220 mm / 9"
Short description: This 9-inch Columbia Mud Roller Replacement provides high-capacity compound retention and uniform application for professional drywall finishing and taping.
Description:
Columbia Mud Roller Replacement - 220 mm / 9" is a professional-grade applicator sleeve designed for the efficient and uniform distribution of drywall joint compound. This high-capacity nap is engineered to hold a significant volume of mud, allowing for consistent coverage across flat surfaces and internal corners with minimal effort.

Built for the rigors of professional job sites, this replacement roller ensures a smooth finish that prepares surfaces perfectly for skimming or taping. Its durable construction maintains structural integrity even when saturated with heavy compounds, providing a reliable tool for high-volume drywall finishing projects.

Features:

  • High-Absorbency Nap: Specifically designed to retain and release joint compound evenly for maximum surface coverage.
  • 9-Inch Width: The 220mm profile provides a wide application path, significantly increasing speed during the initial mudding phase.
  • Precision Fit: Engineered to fit securely on standard Columbia mud roller frames, preventing slipping or uneven pressure during use.
  • Easy Maintenance: The synthetic fibers are designed for quick cleaning and rapid reuse, ensuring long-term durability in professional environments.

The Dura-III is the undisputed leader and most recognized articulating leg extension device in the world today. It is the best selling stilt ever and is the industry standard throughout the industrialized world. The Dura-III stilts feature such things as semi-flexible foot plates and floor plates, nylon leg bearings at all pivot points, beefed up adjustment hole walls, steel wing-bolt inserts, nylon sleeves in the adjustable legs, a universally adjustable side leg support which does not need to be re-adjusted when the stilts are adjusted for height, commercial grade strap webbing, self locking buckles and genuine re-enforced rubber soles. All components are field replaceable for stilt renewability and longevity. The Dura-III is the standard for discerning tradesmen and has an international track record of proven reliability. Description: The TapeTech Corner Finisher is used to perfectly feather both joint compound edges of internal corners in one pass. The Corner Finishers can be used for wall-to-wall internal corners or wall-to-ceiling corners. Corner Finishers, also referred to as Angle Finishers, are attached to a corner applicator (CA07TT or CA08TT) or the 14TT MudRunner® to quickly and professionally finish internal drywall corners. The 40XTT 2″ Corner Finisher is often used with the FHTT or XHTT handle as part of the taping process to embed tape into the corners and remove excess joint compound after the 15TTE Corner Roller. Description: TapeTech Corner Finisher The TapeTech Corner Finisher is designed to perfectly feather both joint compound edges of internal corners in one pass. It can be used for wall-to-wall internal corners or wall-to-ceiling corners. This tool, also known as an Angle Finisher, attaches to a corner applicator (CA07TT or CA08TT) or the 14TT MudRunner®. It helps you quickly and professionally finish internal drywall corners. Perfect for Internal Corners The TapeTech Corner Finisher is ideal for wiping down excess mud in internal corners. It embeds inside corner tape on walls and ceilings, making the finishing process smooth and efficient. Whether you are working on small residential projects or large commercial sites, this tool ensures a high-quality finish every time. Versatility and Ease of Use Corner Finishers are versatile and can be used in various applications. They are perfect for both wall-to-wall and wall-to-ceiling corners. These tools are spring-loaded to help compensate for slightly imperfect corners. This feature ensures that you get a consistent finish even on uneven surfaces. Compatible with Handles The TapeTech Corner Finisher works with the FHTT Fiberglass Handle and the XHTT Extension Handle, though these handles are sold separately. These handles provide extra reach and control, making it easier to work on high or hard-to-reach corners. The ergonomic design of these handles reduces fatigue and increases productivity, allowing you to work more efficiently. Durable and Reliable Crafted from high-quality materials, the TapeTech Corner Finisher is built to last. It can withstand rigorous use on construction sites, ensuring long-term reliability. This durability makes it a valuable addition to any drywall professional’s toolkit. Improve Your Work Quality Using the TapeTech Corner Finisher helps improve the quality of your drywall finishing. It provides a smooth, professional-grade finish that will impress your clients. By making the finishing process more efficient, it also saves you time and effort. This tool is essential for anyone looking to achieve top-notch results in drywall finishing. Specifications: – Usage: Internal corners, both wall-to-wall and wall-to-ceiling – Compatibility: Works with CA07TT, CA08TT corner applicators, and 14TT MudRunner® – Handles: Compatible with FHTT Fiberglass Handle and XHTT Extension Handle (sold separately) Experience the Difference Incorporate the TapeTech Corner Finisher into your workflow to see the difference in performance and ease of use.
